kernel/src/drivers/hal/interrupt.rs :: pub (in crate :: drivers) type InterruptVector  = u32

kernel/src/fs/mod.rs :: pub (crate) use devfs :: DevFileSystem

kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PAGE_SIZE : usize = 4096
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PHYSICAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH : usize = 56
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PPN_WIDTH : usize = PHYSICAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH - PAGE_OFFSET_WIDTH
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PTE_FLAGS_WIDTH : usize = 10
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const SIGNAL_TRAMPOLINE : usize = TRAP_CONTEXT - PAGE_SIZE
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const TRAMPOLINE : usize = usize :: MAX - PAGE_SIZE + 1
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const TRAP_CONTEXT : usize = TRAMPOLINE - PAGE_SIZE

kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const VIRTUAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH : usize = 39
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const VPN_WIDTH : usize = VIRTUAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH - PAGE_OFFSET_WIDTH
